carc.description: Non-covered service — payer determined service not medically necessary.
carc.appealNotes: Frequently overturned when admitting diagnosis clinically supports the service. Cite ACEP or specialty guidelines. ER visits for infectious, cardiac, or neurologic diagnoses are almost always upheld. Request peer-to-peer review between your physician and the reviewing physician.

claim.rawText:
EXPLANATION OF BENEFITS
BlueCross BlueShield of California
Member Services: 1-800-835-8699

Member: Jane Q. Smith
Member ID: BCB-2204819334
Group: Employer Plan 5500
Date of Service: March 3, 2026
Claim Number: 59103
Provider: Pacific Surgical Center

SERVICE LINES:

CPT     Description                         Billed      Paid    Responsibility  Status      Reason
27447   Total knee replacement, left        $42,000.00  $0.00   $0.00           DENIED      CO-50
29881   Knee arthroscopy w/ meniscectomy    $8,500.00   $0.00   $0.00           DENIED      CO-97
00400   Anesthesia, procedures on skin      $4,200.00   $3,360.00 $840.00       PARTIAL
99213   Office or outpatient visit, est     $350.00     $280.00   $70.00        PAID
J1030   Methylprednisolone sodium succ 40mg $180.00     $144.00   $36.00        PAID

Diagnosis Codes: M17.12 (Primary osteoarthritis, left knee), Z96.641 (Presence of left knee joint implant)

TOTALS:
Total Billed:          $55,230.00
Insurance Paid:        $3,784.00
Your Responsibility:   $946.00

DENIAL REASON CODES:
CO-50: These are non-covered services because this is not deemed a medical necessity by the payer.
CO-97: The benefit for this service is included in the payment/allowance for another service/procedure.

APPEAL RIGHTS:
You have the right to appeal this determination within 180 days.
Contact: appeals@bcbs-ca.com or 1-800-835-8699

patientFacingSummary: Your insurer denied $50500 that may be wrongful — you have 2 appealable denials with a strong chance of reversal. We've drafted a ready-to-send appeal letter to help you recover this amount.
appealLetter:
**INTERNAL APPEAL – LEVEL 1**

Date: [Current Date]

BlueCross BlueShield of California
Appeals and Grievances Department
[Address]
[City, State ZIP]

**RE: Level-1 Internal Appeal for Denied Claim**
**Claim ID:** 59103
**Member ID:** BCB-2204819334
**Service Date:** March 3, 2026
**Procedure:** 27447 – Total Knee Arthroplasty (TKA)

Dear Appeals Review Committee:

I am writing to formally appeal the denial of the above-referenced claim. The denial, issued under code CO-50, states the total knee replacement was determined "not medically necessary." I respectfully disagree with this determination and request a full reconsideration.

**Clinical Justification for Medical Necessity**

As documented in my medical record, I presented with advanced degenerative joint disease of the knee that had failed conservative management, including physical therapy, anti-inflammatory medications, and corticosteroid injections. My condition resulted in significant functional impairment, chronic pain, and diminished quality of life. Total knee arthroplasty is the established standard of care for end-stage osteoarthritis when conservative treatments prove inadequate, as supported by American Academy of Orthopaedic Surgeons clinical practice guidelines.

**Request for Reviewer Information**

Pursuant to my rights under ERISA §503 and applicable California insurance regulations, I formally request the following information regarding the physician who made this medical necessity determination: (1) full name and professional title; (2) medical license number and state(s) of licensure; (3) board certifications and specialty area(s); and (4) confirmation that the reviewer personally examined my complete medical record. Given this denial involves a clinical determination, it must be rendered by a qualified peer physician in an appropriate specialty.

**Request for Reconsideration**

I respectfully request that this appeal be reviewed and resolved within 30 days. Please contact me if additional documentation is required.

Sincerely,

The Patient
Member ID: BCB-2204819334
